title: ops-debug
description: Debug an operational issue. Diagnose, fix, verify, document.

what.description: Description of what's broken -- symptoms, not guesses

logs.description: Path to relevant log files or 'witness' to check witness logs

scope.description: Limit investigation to specific files/services (prevents scope creep)

rollback_plan.description: How to undo the fix if it makes things worse

_anti_patterns: Verify dependencies first. Test every tool/API with a 5-min smoke test before building on it.
Config overwrites on restart. Never assume config persists -- verify after gateway restart.
Auto-fix NEVER touches user config. Alert instead of fixing.
Report success WITHOUT verification. Never say 'fixed' without checking actual state.
